nodes.name: Every Day at 9pm
nodes.notes: Triggers every day at 9:00 PM local time

nodes.name: Send Check-in
nodes.notes: Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in n8n Settings > Environment Variables, or replace the expression with your chat ID

value.context: ={{ JSON.stringify({ totalCal: $json.totalCal, totalProtein: $json.totalProtein, totalCarbs: $json.totalCarbs, totalFat: $json.totalFat, isTrainingDay: $json.isTrainingDay, goal: $json.goal, mealCount: $json.mealCount, steps: $json.steps }) }}

nodes.name: Set Awaiting State
nodes.notes: Sets conversation state to 'awaiting_checkin' so WF01 (unified Telegram handler) knows the next message is a check-in reply, not a food log
